actions.saveDisabledTitle: My Decks limit reached ({{limit}}). Delete or export older decks before creating a new saved deck.
actions.saveAsNewTitle: Save current deck as a new saved deck
actions.duplicateDisabledTitle: My Decks limit reached ({{limit}}). Delete or export older decks before duplicating.
actions.keepWorkingCopy: Keep the current deck as a local working copy without tracking the saved deck.
actions.removeMain: Remove one copy from Main Deck
actions.removeEvolve: Remove one copy from Evolve Deck
actions.removeToken: Remove one copy from Token Deck

deckArea.deckNameHint: If left blank, the deck will be saved as {{name}}.

alerts.deckLogInvalidInput: Enter a valid DeckLog code or URL.
alerts.deckLogFetchFailed: Could not load the DeckLog deck. Please try again later.
alerts.deckLogInvalidResponse: DeckLog returned an unexpected deck payload.
alerts.deckLogNotFound: That DeckLog deck could not be found.
alerts.deckLogUnsupportedGame: Only Shadowverse EVOLVE DeckLog decks are supported.
alerts.deckLogCardsLoading: The card database is still loading. Please try DeckLog import again in a moment.
alerts.deckLogImportPartial: Imported the DeckLog deck, but {{count}} cards could not be matched in the local card database.
alerts.emptyBuilder: The builder is empty. Add cards or adjust the setup before saving.
alerts.saveAsNewSuccess: "{{name}}" was saved as a new deck.
alerts.unsavedCopySuccess: The current deck is now an unsaved copy.
alerts.limitReachedHard: My Decks has reached the browser limit ({{limit}}). Delete or export older decks before creating a new saved deck.
alerts.limitReachedSoft: My Decks already has {{count}} saved decks in this browser. Consider exporting or deleting older decks before it reaches {{limit}}.

deckRule.title: Deck Rule
deckRule.promptConstructed: Select a class or title to enable constructed deck building.
deckRule.promptCrossover: Select two different classes to enable crossover deck building.
deckRule.legalReady: This deck is legal and ready to export.

myDecks.title: My Decks
myDecks.subtitle: Saved in this browser
myDecks.disclaimer: My Decks is stored in this browser only. To keep a durable backup or move decks to another device, use Export and save the JSON file.
myDecks.noDecks: No saved decks yet. Build a deck and press Save to keep it in this browser.

addActions.mainLabel: Add one copy to Main Deck
addActions.evolveLabel: Add one copy to Evolve Deck
addActions.tokenLabel: Add one copy to Token Deck

loadDeck.title: Load Saved Deck
loadDeck.desc: Replace the current unsaved changes with "{{name}}"?
loadDeck.note: Your current unsaved edits in Deck Builder will be replaced.
loadDeck.resumeDesc: You have a previous unsaved session for "{{name}}". Do you want to resume it?
loadDeck.resumeSessionDesc: Restore the last Deck Builder session from this browser?
loadDeck.resumeSessionNote: Continue to reopen the previous builder state, or start fresh with an empty deck builder.
loadDeck.resolveIssues: Resolve deck issues after loading before exporting.
loadDeck.deleteBulkHint: Select decks to delete them in bulk.

resetDeck.title: Reset Deck
resetDeck.desc: Clear the current Main Deck, Evolve Deck, Leader, and Token Deck contents?
resetDeck.descNote: Deck rule settings, deck name, and card library filters will stay as they are.

resetBuilder.title: Reset Builder
resetBuilder.desc: Clear the current deck contents, deck name, and rule settings?
resetBuilder.descNote: This also discards the saved Deck Builder session for this browser.

deckLogImport.title: Import from DeckLog
deckLogImport.desc: Paste a DeckLog code or public DeckLog URL to replace the current Deck Builder contents.
deckLogImport.placeholder: e.g. a DeckLog code or a public DeckLog URL
deckLogImport.note: Beta feature. This currently supports Shadowverse EVOLVE DeckLog decks only.

deleteDeck.title: Delete Saved Deck
deleteDeck.desc: Delete "{{name}}" from My Decks on this browser?
deleteDeck.note: This only removes the saved copy in this browser. Exported JSON files are not affected.

deleteSelectedDecks.title: Delete Selected Saved Decks
deleteSelectedDecks.desc: Delete {{count}} selected saved decks from My Decks on this browser?
deleteSelectedDecks.note: This keeps the current DeckBuilder contents as they are. Exported JSON files are not affected.

deleteAllDecks.title: Delete All Saved Decks
deleteAllDecks.desc: Delete all {{count}} saved decks from My Decks on this browser?
deleteAllDecks.note: This keeps the current DeckBuilder contents as they are. Exported JSON files are not affected.

validation.requireTitle: Constructed decks require a selected title.
validation.requireClass: Constructed decks require a selected class.
validation.requireCrossoverClasses: Crossover decks require two different selected classes.
validation.mainDeckTooSmall: Main Deck must contain at least {{expected}} cards ({{actual}}/{{expected}}).
validation.crossoverLeaderClassesInclude: Leader cards must include one {{firstClass}} leader and one {{secondClass}} leader.
validation.crossoverLeaderClassesMatch: Leader cards must match the selected crossover classes.
validation.invalidSection: {{deck}} contains cards in the wrong section: {{cardList}}.
validation.invalidRule: {{deck}} contains cards that do not match the selected deck rule: {{cardList}}.

home.title: Shadowverse Evolve
home.subtitle: The unofficial digital sandbox tabletop. Build your deck and duel your friends directly via Peer-to-Peer without any servers.

dummyArtWarning.part1: Card images are currently displayed as dummies on this site. If you want to use actual card images, please download the source from
dummyArtWarning.part2: and run it locally. P2P matches are possible even when running locally.

soloPlay.title: Solo Play Beta
soloPlay.desc: Practice locally with 2 decks. This mode is still under active tuning.

footer.copyright: The card images used on this site are reproduced from the Shadowverse EVOLVE official website (https://shadowverse-evolve.com/) in accordance with their guidelines. Unauthorized reuse (reproduction, distribution, etc.) of these images is prohibited. © Cygames, Inc. ©bushiroad All Rights Reserved.

game.mulligan_instructions: Select cards in the order you want to put them on the bottom of your deck.
game.mulligan_disclaimer: (The 4th selection will be at the absolute bottom.)

status.loadingCatalog: Loading card catalog... Please wait a moment.
status.availableBeforeStart: Available while preparing decks before the game starts.
status.syncTimedOut: Timed out waiting for host state. Reconnecting...
status.waitingForRestore: Waiting for host session restore... retrying sync.
status.waitingForHostDecision: Host is choosing whether to resume the saved session. Waiting...
status.connectedHostSyncing: Connected to host. Syncing latest game state...
status.guestConnectedChooseResume: Guest connected. Choose whether to resume the saved session.
status.disconnectedFromPeer: Disconnected from Peer server. Reopen room if needed.
status.debugAutoStarted: [DEBUG] Game auto-started. Both decks injected (20 cards each).

inspector.noAbilityText: No detailed ability text found for this card.

deckPicker.title: Load from My Decks
deckPicker.subtitle: Legal saved decks for {{label}}
deckPicker.noDecks: No legal saved decks are available in this browser.

alerts.reconnectingLocked: Reconnecting to host. Actions are temporarily locked until the latest state is synced.
alerts.previousSession: Previous host session found for this room.
alerts.previousSessionTime: You can restore the state from {{time}}.
alerts.previousSessionUnknown: You can restore the previous board state.
alerts.attackSelect: Select an enemy follower or leader for

preparation.title: Preparing Game
preparation.description:
Draw your opening four cards, finish mulligan and Ready, choose who goes first before starting, then press `START GAME`.
Hand cards cannot be moved to other zones during preparation.
preparation.revealHandsModeDesc: When ON, both players' hands are visible to each other

resetGame.title: Reset Game
resetGame.description: Are you sure you want to reset the game to its initial state? All cards will return to their starting decks.

undoTurn.title: Undo Last End Turn
undoTurn.description: This will rewind the board state to just before you ended your turn. Do you want to proceed?

tokenSpawn.title: Generate Tokens
tokenSpawn.description: Choose how many of each token to create, then pick where they should appear.

topN.title: How many cards to look at?

search.noDetailText: No detailed text was found for this card.

topDeck.title: Look at Top {{count}} Cards
topDeck.instruction: Click a card to move it to: {{destination}}

messages.searchSetField: {{actor}} set a card from Search to field
messages.searchToEx: {{actor}} added {{cardName}} from Search to EX Area
messages.searchToExGeneric: {{actor}} added a card from Search to EX Area
messages.cemeteryToEx: {{actor}} added {{cardName}} from Cemetery to EX Area
messages.evolvePlayedField: {{actor}} played to field {{cardName}} from Eボルヴ デッキ
